name: Creole Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the scallions, cucumber, tomatoes, parsley, 1/2 cup of vegetable oil, cider vinegar, Tabasco sauce, cayenne pepper and allspice to make the salsa.
2. Heat remaining oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onions; cook for 2 to 3 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in the celery and carrots; cook another 2 minutes.
4. Add the green peppers; continue cooking until vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes total.
5. Sprinkle allspice and cayenne pepper over the vegetables and stir through.
6. Whisk together tomato paste, remaining oil, cider vinegar, sugar, mustard, herbs (oregano), additional spices (cayenne) in a small bowl until smooth.
7. Stir the sauce into the cooked vegetables.
8. Add the cooked kidney beans; mix well to combine.
9. Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Divide hot rice between serving dishes and top with the bean mixture and salsa.
From WWiVNet. Electronic format by Cathy Harned.
